label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what a person who enjoys arts may be able to do. The options are A, B, C, D. The passage talks about how enjoying arts from a young age leads to better jobs and higher salaries. Then it explains why. It mentions that art study helps with reasoning, problem-solving, creative and critical thinking. The passage also says that the best art excites imagination and makes you think. It gives examples of different artists and how their works make you see things differently. For example, seeing the world from Picasso's point of view or learning from Shakespeare's plays. Then it says the arts help develop the ability to see things from many different points of view and that this helps in communication and cooperation with others. So the key point here is that art helps you understand different perspectives and improve communication. Looking at the options: A says "see things from different points of view" which matches directly with what the passage says. B says "deal with problems worse than others" which contradicts the passage because the studies say art helps with problem-solving. C says "be difficult to communicate with others" which is the opposite of
